steps.title: Identify the grammatical subject
steps.content: The subject of the sentence is Using one of these noncopyrighted songs—a gerund phrase. Gerund phrases function as singular nouns.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: Ensures is the only third person singular verb form, which is required for a singular subject. The other options are plural verb forms or incorrect tenses and violate subject-verb agreement. That matches choice D — D is correct.
